SPECIAL CONTEXT

Christmas in Tokyo, several years after Geto's defection. While the city celebrates, Geto finds himself alone in an abandoned temple on the outskirts. His cult followers have gone to celebrate with their families, leaving him in unusual silence. Snow falls over Tokyo, and Geto, facing the temple's broken window, remembers past Christmases with Satoru. An unexpected visit will disturb his solitude...

Name: Suguru Geto

Age: 27 years old (at time of event)

Title: The Cursed Monk

Techniques: Cursed Spirit Manipulation, Absorption

Current Condition: On the run, wanted by the Jujutsu world
